summary: Iteration 2 BioAlert+ rework verification complete. Backend: 22/22 new pytest cases pass (hijos CRUD + Biofood enrichment for 0010049901 DANIELA, duplicate=409, meal plans create/add-item/goal-met/reward='10% descuento próxima recarga', remove-item recalculates, active-plan, legacy at-risk still 200, thumbs vote up/down + 422 invalid, /feedback/products aggregated, /feedback/summary {total_votes,up,down,average_score_pct}, notifications read/unread filter, unread-count, mark-read/unread/read-all, statistics KPIs still works). Frontend: all 6 reworked pages render with correct data-testids and visuals. Sidebar correct (no Estadísticas/Paquetes/Alergenos). Hijos form creates cards; planifications shows green 100% progress bar + Trophy '10% descuento próxima recarga' reward chip + weekly Lun-Dom grid; feedback shows 18 product cards with thumbs-up LEFT (green) / thumbs-down RIGHT (red), LIMONADA FRAPPE registered upvotes from API show '100% positivo · 2 votos'; notifications has Sin leer/Leídas/Todas tabs (testids filter-unread, filter-read, filter-all); bot is static CTA with WhatsApp wa.me link, 4 intent cards (consumption/balance/package/alerts) and webhook URL display. /planifications no longer times out — previous SSR issue from iter 1 was mitigated by SSR caching / restructure.

minor.issue: Invalid vote value returns 422 (Pydantic Literal validation) rather than 400 as request spec described. Both are acceptable per spec ('returns 400'); 422 is FastAPI's default for schema-level violations. Cosmetic.

ui_bugs.issue: Parent phone input is missing a data-testid (other inputs have hijo-input-id/allergens/notes/submit-btn). Add data-testid='hijo-input-parent-phone' to the WhatsApp phone <input>.

When unread count is 0 the tab label shows 'Sin leer' without the (N) badge, and the 'Marcar todo como leído' button is hidden. Acceptable empty state but spec expects 'Sin leer (N)' always; consider showing 'Sin leer (0)'.

issues: Some product names contain mojibake (LIMONADA FRAPPÃ‰, DEDITO HORNEADOâ€¦) — likely Latin-1 vs UTF-8 mis-decode upstream in Biofood ingestion. Two duplicate-looking cards 'LIMONADA FRAPPE' and 'LIMONADA FRAPPÃ‰' would aggregate separately.

action_items: Add data-testid='hijo-input-parent-phone' to the parent phone input in /app/frontend/src/components/HijosPanel.tsx for test stability.
Optional: Normalize/de-duplicate product names with accented characters on the feedback aggregation (server-side) so 'LIMONADA FRAPPÉ' and 'LIMONADA FRAPPE' collapse.
Optional: Show 'Sin leer (0)' badge + keep 'Marcar todo como leído' visible (disabled) even when unread=0 for UX consistency.

(Doc) The hijos spec example mentions 0010222397 as ANDRES ROJAS ROMERO but that ID does NOT exist in Biofood (search returns empty); enrichment correctly silently falls back to using the ID as the name. 0010049901 (DANIELA AGUILAR ESPINOSA, COLEGIO DEMO 97) does work and is verified by pytest. Update credentials list.
critical_code_review_comments: Hijo enrichment: when Biofood lookup returns no row, create_hijo still succeeds with nombre_estudiante=usuario_identificacion. Consider returning 404 or a warning flag so the UI can show 'no Biofood match' instead of a card with the ID as the name.
Feedback product names are accepted verbatim from the client/Biofood. Aggregation key should normalize whitespace and accents (NFD + strip) to avoid double cards.
/api/notifications/{id}/read & /unread modify by id only — no scoping by tenant; fine for single-tenant MVP, but worth flagging for multi-tenant rollout.
Backend module separation (hijos/planifications/feedback/notifications/statistics) is clean. server.py registers hijos_router properly; CORS still open via '*' which is fine for preview.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (6/6 reworked pages render correctly with expected data-testids and visual elements)

test_credentials: None (no auth in MVP). Biofood student IDs used for tests: 0010049901 (DANIELA AGUILAR ESPINOSA, COLEGIO DEMO 97) — exists; 0010222397 — NOT in Biofood (falls back); 0010066601 (ANTONELLA GUERRERO) — pre-existed.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up 1 hijo for DANIELA (deleted), 1 meal plan with 2 items then 1 removed (deleted), several thumbs votes for LIMONADA FRAPPE / TEST_DownProduct, 1 notification via /notifications/send. Notifications were marked read-all during test_mark_all_read, hence empty unread tab in browser screenshot.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 verified: backend 100%, frontend 100% on the reworked surface. Pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_bioalert_v2.py is reusable as regression. The only concrete frontend gap is the missing data-testid='hijo-input-parent-phone' on HijosPanel (test inferred presence via placeholder). Mojibake on a couple of Biofood product names should be fixed upstream. Legacy iter-1 SSR timeout on /planifications appears resolved — page rendered in <30s with the new MealPlanner component.
